$comment: Committed whitelist of Claude Code hook event names and matcher tool names, pinned so that flow-spec-contradictions pass 2 can tell three states apart: a name that matches exactly is fine; a name within edit-distance 2 of a whitelisted one is a MISSPELLING finding (closes validate_plugin.py's silent acceptance of typos like 'PreTooluse'); a name that matches nothing is UNKNOWN-EVENT, reported apart from findings so a genuine Claude Code upgrade reads as bench maintenance, not a karta defect. Re-pin deliberately when Claude Code ships a new event or tool.
source: Claude Code plugin hook contract as of karta 2.21.0 (2026-07-17)
